95
In Earth Tatva the Antaras are in the order : Earth, Water,
Fire, Air, Sky. Span for Earth Antara (in normal case)= (30/
90)x30 = 10 min
Span for Water Antara (in normal case)= (24/90) x 30 = 8
mm
Span for Fire Antara (in normal case) = (18/90) x 30 = 6
nun
Span for Air Antara (in normal case)= (12/90)x30 = 4 min
Span for Sky antara (in normal case)= (6/90)x30 = 2 min
In our case:
Span for Earth Antara = (10/30) x 28' 40" = 9' 33"
Span for Water Antara = (8/30) x 28' 40" = T 38"
Span for Fire Antara = (6/30) x 28' 40" = 5' 44"
Span for Air Antara = (4/30) x 28' 40" = 3' 49"
i.e If birth took place in Earth Tatva then,
4h 33' 00" + ( 9' 33" + 7' 38 II+ 5' 44") = 4h 56' OS II
4h 56' OS"+ 3'49" = 4h 59' 54"
i.e One possible birth time is between 4h 56' 05" and 4h
59' 54". Now let us look for the other possibility.
In Fire Tatva the Antaras are in the order : Fire, Air, Sky,
Earth, Water.
Span for Fire Ant ara (in normal case) = (18/90) x 18 = 3'
36"
